column1: You _____ go now. We don't need your help.

You _____ go there every day. Nobody else can help them.
You _____ go there every day. You should stay at home. You should study hard to pass the exam.
He can't help you now. He _____ his car.
You _____ repair his car today. He will take a taxi tomorrow.
